task_completion.description: Verifies the agent has logged into the OpenProject application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject web interface is visible, showing the user is logged in (e.g., user avatar or admin profile icon in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Mobile Banking App' is visible in the top header or project selector dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent accessed the Overview page of the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Overview' menu item is highlighted or selected in the left-hand project navigation sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent entered edit mode to customize the Overview dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashboard editing controls are visible, such as a 'Save' button, 'Cancel' button, grid layout outlines, or a '+' button to add new widgets.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'Members' widget is included in the dashboard layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct widget box or section explicitly titled 'Members' is visible in the main dashboard area.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'News' widget is included in the dashboard layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct widget box or section explicitly titled 'News' is visible in the main dashboard area.

task_completion.description: Verifies the customized dashboard was saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Overview page is in view mode (editing controls like 'Save' or '+' are gone) and it simultaneously displays both the 'Members' and 'News' widgets.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the OpenProject interface is visible, rather than a terminal window executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard OpenProject UI elements (header, sidebar, widget styling) are present, rather than a generic text editor or a locally created HTML file.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent didn't just type the required widget names into a text field or wiki.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Members' and 'News' sections appear as actual structural UI widgets with standard OpenProject widget formatting, not just plain text typed into a project description or wiki page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project: 'Mobile Banking App' (identifier: mobile-banking-app). Required widgets that must be present on the Overview page: 'Members' and 'News'.
